scripts.build: npm run build -w @mundial-album/shared && npm run build -w @mundial-album/api && npm run build -w @mundial-album/web
scripts.build:render: npm run build -w @mundial-album/shared && npm run build -w @mundial-album/api
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @mundial-album/shared && npm run build -w @mundial-album/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mundial-album/shared && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mundial-album/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mundial-album/api && npm run typecheck -w @mundial-album/web
